S
SloughGPT
💬Chat🤖Agents🔌Plugins🧠Models⚡Training📊Monitor
⚙️Settings📚API

API Documentation

Base URL

http://localhost:8000
GET/health

Check API health status

POST/inference/generate

Generate text with a model

GET/models

List available models

POST/training/start

Start a training job

GET/training/jobs

List training jobs

GET/datasets

List available datasets
